text: I, Kamal Perera, holding NIC 199034500123, residing at 45 Galle Road, Colombo 03, wish to make an affidavit declaring that the property at 12 Temple Road, Nugegoda belongs to me. Date: 2024-01-15. Jurisdiction: Colombo.

Affidavit of Nimal Bandara, NIC 197823401256V, of No. 22, Kandy Road, Kurunegala. I solemnly declare that I was present at the accident scene on 2023-11-10 and witnessed the collision firsthand. Jurisdiction: Kurunegala.

My name is Sunethra Jayawardena, NIC 198512300987, and I live at 78 Negombo Road, Wattala. I want to declare that my late father Sirisena Jayawardena left the land at Ja-Ela to me alone as per his verbal will. Date: 15th March 2024. Jurisdiction: Gampaha.

I Priyantha Dissanayake, NIC 197001234567, of 14 Station Road, Matara, do hereby solemnly affirm that the vehicle bearing registration WP CAB 3456 is registered in my name and no other person has any claim over it. Date: 2023-09-01. Jurisdiction: Matara.

Need an affidavit. My name is Rukmani Wijesinghe, NIC 200145678901, address: 33 Temple Lane, Maharagama. I declare that I have never been convicted of any criminal offence in Sri Lanka. Jurisdiction: Colombo. Date: 20 February 2024.

Affidavit for court. Deponent: Asanka Fernando, NIC 198867890123, residing at No. 5, Baseline Road, Colombo 09. I state that the signature appearing on the sale agreement dated 2022-06-15 is not mine and I did not authorise it. Date: 2024-02-28. Jurisdiction: Colombo.

I am Dilrukshi Rathnayake, NIC 199234500456V, staying at 91 Peradeniya Road, Kandy. Want to make an affidavit saying that I am the sole caretaker of my mother Soma Rathnayake who is elderly and bedridden. The date is 01-04-2024. Jurisdiction: Kandy.

Deponent: Mahinda Rajapaksha, NIC 197534512789, address 102 Galle Road, Hikkaduwa. I hereby declare that I have been in continuous possession and occupation of the land bearing assessment No. 441/B, Hikkaduwa for over 20 years without any dispute. Date: 2024-03-10. Jurisdiction: Galle.

This is an affidavit by Vindya Kumari, NIC 200256789012, of 7 Hospital Road, Badulla. I declare that I completed my Advanced Level examination in 2020 under index number 1234567 and the results certificate is genuine. Date: 05/01/2024. Jurisdiction: Badulla.

I, Tharaka Senanayake, NIC 198912367845, of No. 88, Flower Road, Colombo 07, make this sworn statement that I am the lawful owner of the business trading as "Lanka Traders" registered at the Colombo Municipal Council. Date: 2023-12-20. Jurisdiction: Colombo.

Affidavit of Chamari Abeysekara, NIC 199567890234, residing at 56 Dutugemunu Street, Kelaniya. I solemnly declare that I did not receive any financial payment from the defendant Roshan Mendis in relation to the alleged loan transaction of Rs. 500,000. Date: 2024-01-30. Jurisdiction: Gampaha.

I Ranjith Gunasekara, NIC 196845678901V, of 200 Colombo Road, Negombo, do solemnly and sincerely declare that the boat bearing registration NB 3421 is my property inherited from my father and I have operated it as a fishing vessel for 15 years. Jurisdiction: Puttalam. Date: March 12 2024.

I need to submit an affidavit. I am Samantha Wickramasinghe, NIC 197723456789, living at 34 Lake Drive, Boralesgamuwa. I declare that I have never applied for or received a passport from the Department of Immigration and Emigration of Sri Lanka before this date. Date: 2024-04-01. Jurisdiction: Colombo.

Deponent Nalin Herath, NIC 198134523456, address: No. 12, Rajapihilla Mawatha, Kandy. Declaring that the deed of transfer bearing No. 4567 in folio 23 of Volume 18 was executed freely and voluntarily without coercion or undue influence on my part. Date: 2023-10-15. Jurisdiction: Kandy.

My name is Kumudini Samarasinghe, NIC 196978901234V, I reside at 89 Old Road, Piliyandala. I wish to state on oath that the land lot No. 234 situated at Piliyandala was gifted to me by my grandmother Podi Nona in 1995 and I have paid rates to the local authority since then. Date: 10-02-2024. Jurisdiction: Colombo.

Affidavit. I am Prasad Jayasuriya, NIC 199878901235, of 67 Mahaweli Road, Ampara. I declare that I am the biological father of the minor child Dineth Jayasuriya born on 14 July 2020 and my name does not appear on the birth certificate due to an administrative error. Date: 2024-02-14. Jurisdiction: Ampara.

I, Shanthi Mendis, NIC 197056789012, of No. 3 Cross Street, Jaffna, solemnly declare that I operated the grocery shop at No. 3 Cross Street, Jaffna from 2005 to 2018 and that the business was destroyed during the civil conflict and no insurance claim was ever filed. Date: 2023-08-20. Jurisdiction: Jaffna.

This affidavit is made by me, Roshan de Silva, NIC 198390123456, residing at 14 Bauddhaloka Mawatha, Colombo 04. I state that I have been employed at ABC Garments Ltd as a supervisor since January 2015 and my employment records confirm uninterrupted service. Date: 2024-03-25. Jurisdiction: Colombo.

Deponent: Anoma Gunaratne, NIC 197612345678V, address 45 Katugastota Road, Kandy. I declare that the signature on the power of attorney document dated 2023-05-10 bearing my name is a forgery and I have never granted any power of attorney to any person. Date: 2024-01-05. Jurisdiction: Kandy.

I am Kelum Pathirana, NIC 199134567890, living at 78 Weligama Road, Matara. I want to make an affidavit. I declare that the fishing net and equipment worth Rs. 350,000 stored at the Weligama harbour belong solely to me and my partner has no ownership rights over them. Date: 2024-04-10. Jurisdiction: Matara.

I, Fathima Rizka, NIC 200034500789, of No. 18 Masjid Road, Beruwala, solemnly affirm that I was not present in Sri Lanka between 01 January 2022 and 31 December 2022 as I was residing in Qatar on a work visa during that period. Date: 15-03-2024. Jurisdiction: Kalutara.

Affidavit by Lasantha Rajapaksha, NIC 197756789013, of 23 Esplanade Road, Trincomalee. I declare that the boat engine with serial number TR-4521 was purchased by me from Mr. A. Sivanesan on 12 March 2021 for Rs. 280,000 and I hold the original receipt. Date: 2023-11-30. Jurisdiction: Trincomalee.

My name is Tharindi Wickrama, NIC 200123456780, address: 56 Haputale Road, Bandarawela. I hereby make this affidavit to state that I am a permanent resident of the Bandarawela area and have been so for the past 22 years as evidenced by my voter registration and utility bills. Date: 2024-02-29. Jurisdiction: Badulla.

I Saman Kumara, NIC 197367890124V, of 101 Puttalam Road, Chilaw, do hereby solemnly declare that my name Saman Kumara and Samarakoon Kumara appearing in various documents refer to one and the same person which is myself and the discrepancy arose due to a clerical error. Jurisdiction: Puttalam. Date: 08/03/2024.

Deponent: Nilmini Perera, NIC 198945678902, residing at 34 Nawala Road, Nugegoda. I declare that I am the legal guardian of the minor Sahan Perera, born 22 September 2015, whose parents are both deceased and I have been caring for the child since 2019. Date: 2024-03-01. Jurisdiction: Colombo.

I am making this affidavit. I am Chandana Marasinghe, NIC 197234501235, of 67 Colombo Street, Kurunegala. I solemnly state that I have never been a director or shareholder of any company and that the company registration documents naming me as a director of Kurunegala Traders Ltd are fraudulent. Date: 2024-01-20. Jurisdiction: Kurunegala.

I, Vijitha Bandara, NIC 196812378901, of No. 9 Peradeniya Road, Kandy, do hereby declare that the motor cycle bearing engine number MC-78234 was not involved in any accident or insurance claim during my period of ownership from 2018 to 2023. Date: 05-02-2024. Jurisdiction: Kandy.

Affidavit of Sewwandi Rathnayake, NIC 199812390456, of 28 Main Street, Polonnaruwa. I declare that I am the rightful heir to the estate of my late mother Kamala Rathnayake who passed away intestate on 15 August 2023 and that I am the only surviving child. Date: 2024-02-10. Jurisdiction: Polonnaruwa.

I Gayan Jayaweera, NIC 199456123789, at 55 Havelock Road, Colombo 05, solemnly declare that the apartment unit 3B at Crescat Residencies was purchased by me using my own funds and my spouse has no financial contribution towards its acquisition. Date: 2024-03-18. Jurisdiction: Colombo.

This sworn statement is made by Amara Dissanayake, NIC 197890345612V, of No. 4 Temple Road, Dambulla. I hereby state that the signature on the cheque bearing number 004532 drawn on the Bank of Ceylon Dambulla branch dated 2023-07-20 is not my signature and I did not issue this cheque. Date: 2024-01-25. Jurisdiction: Matale.
